Video.summary: Take a peek at the region's earliest recorded inhabitants, the Canaanites.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: The Land of Canaan

Video.summary: What have archaeologists uncovered about the arrival of the Israelites into Canaan?
Video.grandparentTitle: The Holy Land Revealed
Video.title: The Arrival of the Israelites

Video.summary: How did the American West come into being, and how was it shaped by myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Westward the Course of Empire

Video.summary: To understand the American West, you have to understand the mark left by its earliest colonists.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: The West in the Colonial Era

Image.alt: The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era

Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: Examine how immense wealth and privilege'for some'left its imprint on the city and its history
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Video.summary: Uncover the history of a church that has been so much more than a place of worship for the people of London
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Image.alt: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Video.summary: Your first "crime of the century" is the mysterious murder of a Hollywood director in 1922.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy
Video.title: A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood

Image.alt: A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood
A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood
A Murder That Almost Killed Hollywood

Video.summary: The ghastly murder of Bridget Cleary takes you into the mystery of human psychology.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy
Video.title: The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895

Image.alt: The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895
The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895
The Deadly Irish Fairy Tale of 1895

Video.summary: Dive into a cycle of mystery and violence in early 20th century Sarajevo.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy
Video.title: The Sarajevo Conspiracy of 1914

Video.summary: Explore the murder of the Russian Tsar Nicholas and other Romanovs at the hands of the Bolsheviks.

Video.title: The Plot to Assassinate the Romanovs

Image.alt: The Plot to Assassinate the Romanovs

Video.title: Three Serial Killers of Weimar Germany

Three Serial Killers of Weimar Germany

Video.summary: Delve into one of the best-known and most debated murder cases in American history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy
Video.title: American Nightmare: The Lindbergh Kidnapping

Video.summary: What drove the Papin sisters to kill and to kill so savagely?
Video.grandparentTitle: Crimes of the Century: A Selective History of Infamy

Murderous Maids: The Papin Sisters of France

Video.summary: Consider what the occult really is and how occult practices seek to alter our everyday perspective.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: What Is the Occult?

Video.summary: Occultism posits that there we are surrounded by a hidden world.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: Fauns, Fairies, and Djinn

Video.summary: The occult concepts and symbolism embedded in common religious practices across different traditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: The Christmas Tree and Other Rituals

Image.alt: The Christmas Tree and Other Rituals
The Christmas Tree and Other Rituals
The Christmas Tree and Other Rituals

Video.summary: Turn now to the utilitarian side of occultism: practical magic.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: Practical Magic: Love, Money, and Health

Image.alt: Practical Magic: Love, Money, and Health
Practical Magic: Love, Money, and Health
Practical Magic: Love, Money, and Health

Video.summary: Consider the three pillars of occultism: alchemy, astrology, and ritual magic.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: Alchemy, Astrology, and Divination

Video.summary: Delve into the world of spirit communication and necromancy from Stone Age shamans to Harry Houdini.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: Talking with the Dead

Video.summary: Ponder practices like human sacrifice, effigies, magic spells, divination, and thaumaturgy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: The Occult Ancient World

Video.summary: Creatures like vampires and zombies are older and more interesting than popular culture suggests.
Video.grandparentTitle: Secrets of the Occult
Video.title: Vampires, Werewolves, and Zombies
